race.comment: The top two are at over 100% in early markets, such is their dominance. DIFRONZO (8) settled midfield then battled away without threatening first-up over 1200m at the Sunshine Coast. Gets a little weight relief today and is better placed out to this trip. In the right race to open his account. NAVY KISS (12) started in the red and looked to have every chance but missed by a neck last time out over this course and distance. Has only raced twice so there is plenty of room for improvement. Likely leader who will prove tough to catch. FUTURE HERO (2) did a reasonable job to finish fifth over 1350m at Doomben last start. Has had plenty of chances - one for the exotics only. COMEON KINGWILLIAM (7) is cherry ripe after three runs back. Can play a key role with the help of the inside gate. MISTER BLAZE (5) won't be winning but can sneak into the frame second-up.
